choices: Extending root surface area and accessing soil phosphorus
Breaking down organic matter into humus

questions.q: Which geological process describes the downward movement of material along a slope due to gravity, without the aid of water or other transport agents?

Which biome is characterized by permafrost, sparse vegetation, and continuous daylight during summer months?

choices: Water level management and habitat creation

questions.q: Which geological epoch, spanning approximately 2.6 million to 11,700 years ago, was characterized by multiple glacial and interglacial cycles?

choices: Bacteria and enzymes from trapped insects

Increased leaf surface area and thin cuticles
